layout.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6 align-items-start
layout.kanban: flex overflow-x-auto gap-4 pb-4 snap-x snap-mandatory h-[calc(100vh-12rem)]
layout.kanban_column: min-w-[320px] w-[320px] flex flex-col gap-3 snap-start
layout.setup_wizard: max-w-2xl mx-auto flex flex-col gap-12 py-16

buttons.primary: bg-[#2A4B41] text-white hover:bg-[#1F3830] transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-2.5 font-medium border border-[#2A4B41]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#1A1C1B] hover:bg-[#F2F0EC] transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-2.5 font-medium border border-[#E5E2DC]
buttons.accent: bg-[#C76D54] text-white hover:bg-[#A85A45] transition-colors rounded-none px-6 py-2.5 font-medium border border-[#C76D54]

cards.base: bg-white border border-[#E5E2DC] shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 rounded-none
cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-sm rounded-none

status_badges.base: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

inputs.base: w-full bg-[#F9F8F6] border border-[#E5E2DC] rounded-none px-4 py-2 text-[#1A1C1B] focus:border-[#2A4B41] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2A4B41] transition-all

visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px solid borders to define hierarchy, avoiding soft shadows where possible. Neo-brutalist but elegant.
visual_enhancers.live_indicators: Use pulsing dots (a small div with animate-ping behind a solid dot) for Live Call statuses.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with 'duotone' weight for a high-end, detailed look.

setup_wizard_hero.description: Minimalist architecture building. Use this as a muted, low-opacity background image behind the main setup wizard or in the onboarding welcome screen to establish a high-end real-estate feel.

empty_state_leads.description: Modern empty living room. Use this in the empty state of the Leads table or Kanban board to imply 'waiting for your first property lead'.

empty_state_calls.description: Clean desk with a device. Use this for the Live Calls empty state to signify 'standing by for incoming calls'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color palette. DO NOT use generic Tailwind colors like bg-blue-500 or text-gray-500. Use the defined hex codes.
For the Setup Wizard, use 'The Tracing Beam' layout or a highly spaced vertical stepper with explicit copy buttons (Shadcn customized).
Kanban board MUST use horizontal scrolling with sticky column headers and tight gaps.
Live Calls require an animated pulse effect for 'ringing' or 'connected' states.
Always wrap interactive elements (buttons, inputs) with `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='setup-webhook-copy'`).
Empty states MUST include the provided image URLs and a clear CTA button.
Use Phosphor Icons (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) - duotone variant.
All cards and form elements must have sharp corners (rounded-none) to reflect the Swiss/Architecture theme, except for status badges which can be fully rounded.
